item.title: README
item.description: Obsidian_BJJ Obsidian repository for BJJ notes.

item.title: Guard retention drills
item.description: Rotating with opponent On back with legs on defensive posture. Rotate with elbows. This is particularly easy to practice at home as well.

item.title: Close guard overhook stiff
item.description: Description The goal is to assume further control from Closed guard by obtaining a Overhook on opponents arm and straightening it.

item.title: Two grip choke on turtle
item.description: Description Basically you can feed the Lapel in a tricky way to force choke.

item.title: Unfamiliar techniques
item.description: const pages = dv.current().file.inlinks; if (pages.length === 0) { dv.paragraph("No backlinks."); } else { dv.list(pages.map(p => p.path)); } const unresolved = new Set(); for (let page of dv.pages()) { const links = page.file.outlinks; for (let link of links) { if (!dv.page(link.path))...

item.title: BJJ journey
item.description: Process Overall process is loosely based on Zettelkasten methodology, which has been changed to suit my tracking of BJJ journey.

item.title: Thumb and cuff grip
item.description: Description Grip where you have only the thumb inside the lapel or similar clothing.

item.title: Turtle to Papercutter
item.description: Position at 2 o’clock and underhook on the same side to grab lapel. Other hand Thumb and cuff grips the neck. Jump to feet and raise opponent.

item.title: Side shimmy practice
item.description: The usual sunday thing. Find a proper name and explanation for this.

item.title: Turtle to Crusifix
item.description: Force lower knee between knee shield. Reach over with lower arm and control far knee. Grab your closer knee and pull forward and isolate the arm.
